title: Kars Optimized Multiplayer
description: Modpack for Minecraft 1.20.4 with staple performance mods and QoL utility mods suitable for multiplayer use
body:
This modpack will provide staple performance mods (and extras) to help maximizing your fps output.

Disclaimer: maximizing your fps output doesn't mean it will not fluctuate or be very stable. The game settings will affect performance a lot, and some mod may not work well when paired with other mods, making some fps spikes inavoidable.

# Another optimization pack?
Yes.

Although, this one is equipped with various QoL tools and enhancements for playing in multiplayer servers.

You may or may not like the QoL mods included in this pack.

## Notable features:
- Chest Tracker: This mod will greatly help you finding specific item between your monster chest storage, just open each of them once to allow the mod to cache its contents as NBT file, then you can press **CTRL+F** to search your item. It will then return relevant results to you that if clicked on, will show you glowing boxes in which your item is stored in.
- Amecs: This mod allows you to combine keybinds with **CTRL**, **ALT**, and **SHIFT**, so you will have a lot more flexibility for keybinds.
- EMI: EMI is a relatively new NEI-like mod that is fast, requires zero dependencies, and will not hog up your computer resources. It also has plenty of features, similar to its competitors. If you need more features, there are various external mods that can be added to complement its functionality. Press **ENTER** while opening inventory/container gui to focus to search bar. Press **BACKSPACE** to return to the previous recipe. Press **LMB/R** while hovering over an item to view the recipe for that item. Press **RMB/U** while hovering over an item to view its usage. Press **A** to favourite any item, it will be shown on the bottom-left section.
- Chat Calc, Chat Patches, ChatUtils: These three will help you solve chat games, finding particular keyword in chats, keeping the chat history stays after server switches or game restarts. Open chat and **press and hold LCTRL while clicking with LMB** to copy the raw text from a line. Use **RMB** to copy raw/formatted/json text or its unix timestamp.
- ClientHarvest: Farming in multiplayer servers are often tedious due to how your player will sometimes chew up raw plantable plants, making you take longer time to replant your harvested items. This mod simply fixes that by replanting your plants using your active mainhand plant as source.
- Extended Hotbar, HotbarReplace: Allows you to have one extra hotbar slot that is swappable and will refresh your used items for you to allow swift structure building process. Press **R** to swap your hotbar.
- Inventory Binds: You have three extra buttons that can be customized to your liking. By default, this modpack will give you a `/home Home` button, a `/back` button, and a `/spawn` button. You can read [how to configure the buttons here](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-binds).
- Freecam (Modrinth Version): Allows you to roam around the loaded area centered in your player entity without the clipping feature to comply with "no x-ray or cave finder" rules. Press **F9** to activate or deactivate this mod.
- Xaero's Minimap (Fair-Play): This nerfed version disables entity tracking and cave tracking to prevent you from gaining unfair advantages in PVP and mining.
- Press **C** to zoom, scroll wheel to adjust. Press **CTRL+N** to toggle Night Vision mode. Press and hold **CTRL+C** while clicking a slot in your inventory to lock/unlock a slot. Locking a slot prevent items contained within it from being dropped.
- Everything else is adjustable from the keybind option. Remember that you can use **CTRL ALT SHIFT** to rebind the keys.

## The following mods might trigger server anticheats and/or is disapproved to be used in some multiplayer server.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Bridging Mod
- Cat Eyes - Night Vision Toggle Mod
- Extended Hotbar
- HotbarReplace
- Freecam (Modrinth Edition)
- XPlus Autofish (Fabric)
- Xaero's Minimap (Fair-Play)

</details>

The most sensitive mod that will most likely trigger server anticheat is Bridging Mod, due to how it works, some anticheats may flag them as "air block placement" because the player don't look at the block face when placing new placeable blocks using that mod.

The rest of the mods can be considered as "gaining technical advantage" in some servers, so please check out the server rules and/or reach out the server staff before using them. However, alternatives such as Freecam (Modrinth Edition) and Xaero's Minimap (Fair-Play) has been used to help complying with most server rules.

# Credits
This modpack would not be possible to create without every mod author, creator, maintainer, and contributor from every mod included in this modpack.

You may use this modpack as a base modpack for your modpack, just include anything that links to this Modrinth page.
